description: System file and directory management with user path and file reading support.

commands.count_items: Counts the total number of files and folders in a given path, without listing them.
commands.list_files: SCANS and lists files/folders in a path to return the names to the AI.
commands.read_file: Reads the textual content of a file specified by the path.

function.name: FILE_MANAGER__count_items
function.description: Counts the total number of files and folders in a given path, without listing them.

path.description: The path of the directory to inspect.

function.name: FILE_MANAGER__list_files
function.description: SCANS and lists files/folders in a path to return the names to the AI.

path.description: The path of the directory to inspect (e.g., 'desktop' or an absolute path).

function.name: FILE_MANAGER__read_file
function.description: Reads the textual content of a file specified by the path.

path.description: The path of the text file to read.
